description: Coulson wakes up in the Superior’s submarine with May, realizing they have successfully escaped the Framework. The effects of long-term physical disuse set in as May disorients and Coulson helps her. They spot Aida in a pod, her real body vulnerable at last. Coulson grabs a scalpel, preparing to neutralize Aida’s threat once and for all.
location: Anton Ivanov's drilling platform / Superior's submarine (Baltic Sea)

transcript.line: I'm amazed you went through. I was a little squirrelly on the other side.
May, I'm so sorry. I tried to find you.
Stinking robots. At least you had a shotgun axe.
This is unbelievable. You were right. None of this is real.
